topic: Noah's Ark and the Great Flood

script.title: Noah's Ark and the Great Flood 🌈 | Bible Story for Kids

scenes.narration: Long ago, the world had grown wild and unkind. But there was one good man named Noah, who loved God with his whole heart and listened carefully when God spoke.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful children's storybook illustration of Noah, a kind older man with a long white beard and gentle eyes, standing on a grassy hillside with his family, soft golden sunlight, warm and whimsical cartoon style, family-friendly

scenes.narration: God told Noah a great flood was coming to wash the world clean. Build a giant boat, God said, an ark to keep your family and the animals safe.
scenes.image_prompt: Bright cheerful storybook illustration of Noah looking up toward a glowing warm light in the sky, hands lifted gently, peaceful expression, soft clouds parting, whimsical cartoon style, wonder-filled and family-friendly

scenes.narration: Noah and his sons got right to work. They sawed and hammered tall wooden planks for years and years, building the biggest boat anyone had ever seen.
scenes.image_prompt: Cheerful storybook illustration of Noah and his three sons happily hammering and sawing huge wooden boards, building a giant brown wooden ark, sawdust flying, sunny day, bright cartoon colors, family-friendly

scenes.narration: Then God sent the animals, two by two. Lions and lambs, elephants and ducks, giraffes and tiny mice all marched up the ramp into the warm safe ark.
scenes.image_prompt: Whimsical bright storybook illustration of pairs of friendly cartoon animals walking up a long wooden ramp into a giant ark, lions, elephants, giraffes, ducks, mice, rainbow line of creatures, joyful and colorful, family-friendly

scenes.narration: Then the rain began to pour. It fell for forty days and forty nights, until the whole world was covered in rolling, splashing water.
scenes.image_prompt: Cheerful storybook illustration of the giant wooden ark floating on huge blue waves with friendly raindrops splashing down, gentle stormy sky with soft round clouds, cozy and family-friendly cartoon style, not scary

scenes.narration: Inside the ark, Noah cared for every animal. He fed them, cleaned them, and trusted God to keep them safe through the long, splashing storm.
scenes.image_prompt: Warm cozy storybook illustration of Noah inside the ark, smiling as he hands food to friendly cartoon animals in their stalls, soft lantern light, peaceful and bright, family-friendly cartoon style

scenes.narration: At last the rain stopped. Noah sent out a little dove, and it returned carrying a fresh green leaf. Dry land had appeared again.
scenes.image_prompt: Bright cheerful storybook illustration of a gentle white dove flying back to the ark window with a green olive leaf in its beak, Noah smiling with joy, soft golden sunshine breaking through clouds, family-friendly cartoon style

scenes.narration: God painted a giant rainbow across the sky as a promise of His love. Noah teaches you that when you trust God, He always keeps His word.
scenes.image_prompt: Joyful storybook illustration of a huge bright rainbow arching over the ark resting on a green hillside, Noah's family and all the animals walking out happily, sunshine, fluffy clouds, hopeful and warm, family-friendly cartoon style
